title: pyrrosia splendens
intro: Pyrrosia splendens, also known as the Golden Club Moss or Golden Lip Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Native to tropical regions of Asia, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pyrrosia splendens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Pyrrosia splendens typically involve drying and processing the leaves to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
